acceptanceEvidenceClass: owner doc review and scoped rules lint attempt
rootCause: The coding guardrails did not previously define a durable threshold for replacing long if/switch branch chains with factory and strategy boundaries.
prevention: Added the Branch Strategy Boundary rule to docs/owners/operations/codex_coding_guardrails.md and connected the same check to the anti-pattern review checklist.
verification: Reviewed docs/owners/operations/codex_coding_guardrails.md diff; attempted node import of tools/docs-lint/sync-recurrence-closeout.mjs but current dirty tools/docs-lint/lib.mjs has a duplicate identifier syntax error.
